sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.1.5

  • Fixed: Quick Add barcode lookup did nothing when tapping template buttons (wcbpLookup was a dead stub).
  • Fixed: No way to trigger barcode lookup without a hardware keyboard — added a 🔍 Look Up button.
  • Fixed: inputmode=none prevented software keyboard on mobile, making manual barcode entry impossible.

1.1.4

  • Fixed: Quick Add product image blank due to race condition — Save button now disabled during photo upload.

1.1.3

  • Maintenance release.

1.1.2

  • Fixed: Fatal 500 error on Label Templates page.

1.1.1

  • Fixed: Label Templates JS crash and media picker cross-origin error.

1.1.0

  • New: Inventory management module.

1.0.1

  • Fixed barcode live preview. Added A4 paper size support.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
